revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-1055

(Ship's) Head

Alternative term:(Ship's) Heading (defined in Chapter 1-2-045)

The horizontal direction in which a ship is pointed, expressed as an angular measure from a reference direction, usually true North.

{{IALAFooter}}
